1.name: Fortitude
1.description: grants the Cainite the ability to resist all kinds of damage, however it fulfills its part of God's curse in that it bred arrogance and overconfidence. Sometimes, Cainite masters of Fortitude become convinced of their own indestructibility to the point that they disregard even mortal danger, as their survival instincts slowly atrophy. [ 1 ]

2.name: Obdurate
references: Winter's Teeth No. 1 issue #3 Supplemental Material pg. 3

2.name: Seal the Beast's Maw
2.description: The vampire can ignore the effects of their Hunger for a scene, at the risk of becoming frenzied.

2.name: Shatter
2.description: The vampire becomes so tough, that they repel close combat blows, to the point where weapons break and bones shatter. Requirement : ​ Toughness.
references: Cults of the Blood Gods Pg. 104-105

6.name: Alabastard
6.description: ​ Alabastard : Ignore damage penalties Armor of Vitality/Personal Armor/The Knight's Bane : Weapons that hit you may break Curse the Laurel : Slowly move your heart while staked to stop being paralyzed Sensory Shield : Protect your mind from sensory overload and suffer less wound penalties Stand Against All Foes : Cannot be moved from your spot by any force

6.name: Armor of Vitality
6.description: /Personal Armor/The Knight's Bane : Weapons that hit you may break

6.name: Curse the Laurel
6.description: Slowly move your heart while staked to stop being paralyzed

6.name: Personal Armor
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 159

6.name: Sensory Shield
6.description: Protect your mind from sensory overload and suffer less wound penalties

6.name: Stand Against All Foes
6.description: Cannot be moved from your spot by any force
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 155

6.name: The Knight’s Bane
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 221

7.name: Armor of Kings
7.description: Armor of Kings : Weapons that hit you may break, doing no damage Curse the Laurel : Slowly move stakes from your heart Resilient Mind : Your mind sheds derangements and animalistic quirks while becoming resistant to mind-altering powers Shared Strength : Grant your supernatural resilience to another
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 155

7.name: Curse the Laurel
7.description: Slowly move your heart while staked to stop being paralyzed

7.name: Resilient Mind
7.description: Your mind sheds derangements and animalistic quirks while becoming resistant to mind-altering powers

7.name: Shared Strength
7.description: Grant your supernatural resilience to another
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 159

7.name: The Blessing of Vitality
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 221

8.name: Adamantine
8.description: ​ Adamantine : Weapons that hit you may break, doing no damage Eternal Vigilance : Remain awake during the day almost at full strength King of the Mountain : Take no actions but fully blocking attacks, breaking weapons that you stop Repair the Undead Flesh : Heal aggravated damage without need of rest Armored Flesh : Suffer no damage outside of combat, and block attacks with your bare hands.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 159

8.name: Armored Flesh
8.description: Suffer no damage outside of combat, and block attacks with your bare hands.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 222

8.name: Eternal Vigilance
8.description: Remain awake during the day almost at full strength

8.name: King of the Mountain
8.description: Take no actions but fully blocking attacks, breaking weapons that you stop

8.name: Repair the Undead Flesh
8.description: Heal aggravated damage without need of rest
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 156

9.name: Arm of Prometheus
9.description: of Prometheus : Make one of your limbs completely indestructible for 10 minutes
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 156
